reviews.title: What Our Clients Say
reviews.subtitle: Real results from real people

items.content: The consultation was amazing! They helped me understand my skin type and created a perfect routine. My acne cleared up in just 6 weeks!
I was skeptical at first, but the free consultation convinced me. The expert really knew what she was talking about. My skin has never looked better!
Best decision ever! The personalized skincare routine they created for me actually works. I tried so many products before, nothing compared to this.
The team is so professional and responsive! They answered all my questions and helped me build confidence in my skincare journey.

reviews.disclaimer: Individual results may vary. Testimonials are from real clients but results depend on individual skin conditions and commitment to the recommended routine.

authority.title: Meet Our Founder
authority.subtitle: Dr. Rachel Chen, Licensed Esthetician & Skincare Expert

image.alt: Dr. Rachel Chen, Founder and Lead Beauty Consultant

paragraphs: With over 15 years of experience in the beauty industry, Dr. Rachel Chen founded RadiantGlow Beauty with a simple mission: make expert skincare advice accessible to everyone.
After seeing countless clients struggle with confusing product claims and cookie-cutter routines, she created a personalized consultation service that puts your unique needs first.
Today, our team of certified consultants has helped over 15,000 clients achieve their dream skin through science-backed, personalized guidance.

countdown.title: ⏰ Limited Time: Free Consultation Slots
countdown.subtitle: Only 8 consultation slots available this week. Book yours before they're gone!

expiredFallback.title: Free Consultations Still Available
expiredFallback.subtitle: Contact us to check current availability

cta.prefilledMessage: I want to book a free consultation slot

items.question: Is the consultation really free?
items.answer: Yes! Your first consultation is completely free with no obligations. We want to help you understand your skin and provide value before you make any decisions.

items.question: How does the consultation work?
items.answer: Simply click the WhatsApp button, and one of our certified consultants will chat with you. We'll ask about your skin concerns, goals, and current routine, then provide personalized recommendations.

items.question: Do I need to buy products from you?
items.answer: Not at all! We provide honest recommendations based on your needs. Some clients prefer to purchase through us, while others buy elsewhere. Our goal is to guide you, not pressure you.

items.question: How long does a consultation take?
items.answer: Most consultations take 15-30 minutes via WhatsApp chat. You can take your time and ask as many questions as you need.

items.question: What if I'm not satisfied?
items.answer: Your satisfaction is our priority. If you're not happy with the recommendations, we'll work with you to adjust the plan. Our free consultation means zero risk for you.

items.question: Can I contact you after the consultation?
items.answer: Absolutely! We provide ongoing support via WhatsApp. Have questions about your routine? Just message us anytime.

contactCta.text: Still Have Questions? Chat With Us
contactCta.prefilledMessage: I have a question about the consultation service

assurance.title: Our Promise to You
assurance.subtitle: Your trust means everything to us
assurance.description: We're committed to providing honest, expert guidance that puts your skin health first. No gimmicks, no false promises—just real results from certified professionals.
assurance.closingText: Ready to transform your skin with expert guidance?

cta.prefilledMessage: I'm ready to start my free consultation

links.content: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. Any information shared during consultations is kept strictly confidential.
By using our consultation services, you agree to our terms. Consultations are for informational purposes only and do not replace professional medical advice.

footer.disclaimer: Results may vary. Individual results depend on skin type, condition, and adherence to recommended routines. Consultation services are for informational purposes and do not constitute medical advice. For medical concerns, please consult a dermatologist.
